core_principles: Minimal and very clean design inspired by Crextio HR platform
Soft, elegant aesthetic with generous spacing (2-3x more than typical)
Professional but approachable for water sustainability brand
Clarity over decoration - every element serves a purpose
Breathing room and visual hierarchy through whitespace
design_philosophy.target_audience: Sales teams, managers, VP, directors, CEO at Nyla Air Water India operations
design_philosophy.brand_identity: Water company, sustainable, premium quality, eco-conscious

typography.strategy: The Soft Utility - Rounded Humanist Sans for friendly approachability with Clean Sans Body

heading.usage: Main headings (h1, h2), dashboard titles, page headers
heading.notes: Use font-light (300) for elegant large headings, font-semibold (600) for section headers, font-bold (700) for emphasis

subheading.usage: Subheadings (h3, h4, h5), card titles, section labels
subheading.notes: Clean and readable, pairs well with Manrope

body.usage: Body text, paragraphs, descriptions, table content

color_system.archetype: ORGANIC & EARTHY (Trust, Growth, Calm) - Perfect for Water Sustainability Brand
color_system.palette_strategy: Soft, muted earth tones with warm neutrals. Avoid bright teal/ocean blues. Use gentle sage, warm sand, soft cream backgrounds with subtle accents.

background.description: Warm off-white, almost cream - main app background

background_secondary.description: Soft beige for cards and elevated surfaces

foreground.description: Warm dark brown for primary text - excellent contrast

foreground_muted.description: Medium warm gray for secondary text

primary.description: Soft sage green - water sustainability, growth, calm
primary.usage: Primary CTAs, active states, key actions - USE SPARINGLY

accent.description: Soft warm yellow - highlights, gentle emphasis (like Crextio reference)
accent.usage: Highlights, badges, gentle emphasis, status indicators
accent.notes: Use for positive states, featured items, soft highlights

chart_colors.description: Earthy, muted palette for data visualization - color-blind friendly

contrast_requirements.critical_rule: ALWAYS set explicit text color on hover states - never rely on inheritance
contrast_requirements.focus_states: Must have HIGHER contrast than default state with visible focus ring

forbidden_colors: Pure black (#000000) or pure gray (#808080) - use tinted neutrals instead

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing - use 2-3x more than typical designs for breathing room
spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind default: p-1, p-2, p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12, p-16, p-20, p-24, p-32
critical_rules: Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8 minimum)
Mobile images MUST NOT exceed 80vh height - use max-h-[80vh] md:max-h-none
Grid items MUST be direct children of grid containers
Use align-items: start on grids, add align-self: stretch to individual items as needed

dashboard_grid.type: High Density Grid - for data correlation and scanability
dashboard_grid.usage: Dashboard metrics, analytics cards, data widgets

list_grid.notes: Use Shadcn Table component with custom styling

alignment_rules: Left-align: paragraphs, labels, inputs, dense content, lists, forms, tables
Center-align: only for hero sections or when it improves visual hierarchy
Buttons: align relative to container context
Optical alignment over geometric - adjust for visual weight

surface_strategies.primary_approach: Flat Solid with subtle borders - Medical/Clinical precision for data clarity

header_nav.type: Horizontal top navigation - clean and professional
header_nav.notes: Slight blur for depth, solid enough for text clarity

sidebar.usage: Optional secondary navigation for deep sections

badges.style: Soft pill badges with accent color

required: Form - for all form inputs with validation
shadcn_components.customization_notes: Override default Shadcn styles to match Nyla brand - change colors, radius, spacing. Remove default heights (h-9) with h-auto to prevent content cutoff.

charts.styling: Use earthy chart color palette, generous padding, clear labels, accessible color combinations

icons.style: Consistent stroke width, use sparingly for clarity
icons.size: w-5 h-5 for inline, w-6 h-6 for standalone
icons.color: text-[hsl(25,10%,45%)] for neutral, text-[hsl(155,35%,42%)] for primary actions

custom_components_needed: StatusUpdateCard - for daily status with AI assistance

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Subtle, purposeful animations - enhance UX without distraction
required_animations: Hover states on all interactive elements

specific_animations.page_transition: Fade in content on route change

accessibility.focus_management: Animations must not interfere with keyboard navigation

critical_requirements: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attribute
Contrast ratios must meet WCAG AA standards (4.5:1 for normal text)
Focus indicators must be visible and high contrast
Keyboard navigation must work for all interactions
Screen reader friendly labels and ARIA attributes
Form validation with clear error messages
Responsive text sizing (no fixed px for body text)

data_testid_convention.applies_to: buttons, links, form inputs, menus, error messages, key data displays

dashboard.layout: High density grid with metrics cards, charts, recent activity feed
dashboard.metrics_cards: 4 key KPIs in grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4
dashboard.charts: 2-3 main charts in col-span-2 or col-span-3
dashboard.activity_feed: Sidebar or bottom section with recent leads, follow-ups

leads_list.layout: Full-width table with filters, search, pagination
leads_list.table_style: Shadcn Table with custom styling - alternating row backgrounds
leads_list.filters: Top bar with Select dropdowns, Search input, Sort options
leads_list.actions: Row actions in dropdown menu, bulk actions in header
leads_list.pagination: Bottom with page numbers and items per page selector

lead_detail.layout: Two-column on desktop: left = contact info/details, right = activity timeline
lead_detail.sections: Contact Info, Location Details, SKUs, Current Brand, Activity Timeline, Comments
lead_detail.timeline: Vertical timeline component with interaction icons, timestamps, notes
lead_detail.actions: Edit, Delete, Add Follow-up buttons in header

add_edit_lead.form_sections: Basic Info, Contact Details, Location (cascading dropdowns), SKUs, Current Brand
add_edit_lead.validation: Real-time validation with clear error messages
add_edit_lead.actions: Save, Cancel buttons at bottom (sticky on mobile)

daily_status_update.sections: Leads Contacted, Follow-ups Completed, New Opportunities
daily_status_update.ai_assistance: AI revision button for each section to improve text
daily_status_update.submission: Submit button at bottom, confirmation toast

team_status_feed.filters: Tabs for time period, dropdown for team member
team_status_feed.feed_cards: Individual status cards with user avatar, timestamp, content
team_status_feed.ai_summary: AI-generated summary at top for selected period

follow_ups_calendar.layout: Calendar view with Shadcn Calendar component
follow_ups_calendar.events: Follow-up items displayed on calendar dates
follow_ups_calendar.actions: Click date to add follow-up, click event to view/edit

reports_analytics.filters: Date range, team member, location, status
reports_analytics.charts: Line charts for trends, bar charts for comparisons, pie charts for distribution

location_analytics.charts: Bar charts for top locations, pie chart for regional distribution

team_management.list: Table with team members, roles, contact info
team_management.actions: Add member, edit member, view member details

hero_images.description: Clean glass of water - minimal aesthetic
hero_images.usage: Login page background, splash screen, about section

hero_images.description: Clean plant with water droplets - sustainability

team_collaboration.usage: Team management page, about team section

team_collaboration.description: Two women working together on project

image_assets.usage_notes: Use images sparingly - this is a data-focused CRM. Images should support brand identity without overwhelming the interface.

responsive_design.mobile_first: Always design mobile-first, enhance for larger screens
critical_mobile_optimizations: Daily Status Update must be mobile-optimized (primary use case)
Navigation collapses to hamburger menu (Sheet component)
Tables become scrollable or card-based on mobile
Forms stack vertically with full-width inputs
Charts resize responsively with maintained aspect ratios
tablet_ipad_optimizations: Hybrid layouts - not quite desktop, not quite mobile
Optimized for landscape and portrait orientations

performance_considerations.lazy_loading: Lazy load charts, heavy components, images
performance_considerations.code_splitting: Split routes for faster initial load
performance_considerations.optimized_images: Use WebP format, responsive images with srcset
performance_considerations.skeleton_screens: Show skeleton UI while loading data

required_installations.name: recharts
required_installations.command: Already available via Shadcn Chart components

required_installations.name: react-hook-form
required_installations.usage: Form management with Shadcn Form components

optional_enhancements.name: react-window
optional_enhancements.usage: Virtualized lists for performance with large datasets

update_index_css.description: Update /app/frontend/src/index.css with new color system and fonts

font_family_updates.body: font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;

scrollbar_customization.description: Custom scrollbar styling for clean, minimal look
scrollbar_customization.css_implementation: ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; height: 8px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: hsl(38, 35%, 94%); border-radius: 4px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: hsl(38, 20%, 75%); border-radius: 4px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: hsl(155, 35%, 42%); }

critical_steps: 1. UPDATE /app/frontend/src/index.css with new color system (light theme colors from css_custom_properties section)
2. ADD font imports to index.css (all 4 Google Fonts imports)
3. UPDATE font-family declarations in index.css for body, headings, and utility classes
4. ADD custom scrollbar styles to index.css
5. INSTALL required libraries: framer-motion, date-fns, react-hook-form, zod
6. CREATE custom components: ActivityTimeline, StatusUpdateCard, TeamFeedCard, MetricCard, LeadCard
7. CUSTOMIZE Shadcn components to match Nyla brand (colors, radius, spacing)
8. IMPLEMENT responsive layouts following mobile-first approach
9. ADD data-testid attributes to all interactive elements
10. ENSURE all hover states have explicit text colors (never rely on inheritance)
11. USE generous spacing throughout (2-3x more than typical)
12. APPLY pill-shaped buttons (rounded-full) for primary actions
13. USE soft beige cards with subtle borders and shadows
15. ENSURE accessibility: contrast ratios, keyboard navigation, screen reader support
instructions_to_main_agent.design_reference: Crextio HR platform - minimal, clean, soft beige/cream aesthetic with generous spacing and professional approachability
instructions_to_main_agent.brand_essence: Water sustainability company - trust, growth, calm, premium quality, eco-conscious
instructions_to_main_agent.color_usage: Use primary sage green SPARINGLY - only for CTAs and key actions. Rely on soft neutrals (beige, cream, warm browns) for most of the interface. Accent yellow for highlights and positive states.
instructions_to_main_agent.spacing_emphasis: This is CRITICAL - use 2-3x more spacing than you think is necessary. Generous padding, large gaps, breathing room everywhere. This creates the premium, clean aesthetic.
instructions_to_main_agent.component_customization: Shadcn components are the foundation, but MUST be heavily customized. Change default colors, increase border-radius to rounded-xl, add more padding, adjust shadows to be very subtle.
instructions_to_main_agent.mobile_priority: Daily Status Update is mobile-first - this is where sales teams will spend most time. Make it effortless on mobile devices.
instructions_to_main_agent.data_visualization: Use earthy chart colors (sage, terracotta, ochre, clay, moss) - avoid bright blues and purples. Ensure color-blind friendly combinations.
avoid_patterns: DO NOT center-align everything - use left-alignment for readability
DO NOT use bright teal or ocean blue - use soft sage green instead
DO NOT use sharp corners everywhere - use rounded-xl (12px) for soft feel
DO NOT use heavy shadows - keep them very subtle (shadow-sm, shadow-md max)
DO NOT cram content - generous spacing is key to the aesthetic
DO NOT use transparent backgrounds without blur on overlays
DO NOT forget explicit hover text colors

core_principles: Clarity over cleverness - every design decision should enhance usability
Consistency in patterns - same actions should look and behave the same way
Feedback for all interactions - users should always know what's happening
Progressive disclosure - show what's needed, hide complexity until required
Error prevention over error handling - design to prevent mistakes
Accessibility is not optional - design for all users from the start

interaction_patterns.loading_states: Use skeleton screens, not spinners, for better perceived performance
interaction_patterns.empty_states: Provide helpful guidance and clear CTAs when no data exists
interaction_patterns.error_states: Clear, actionable error messages with recovery suggestions
interaction_patterns.form_validation: Real-time validation with inline error messages
interaction_patterns.destructive_actions: Always confirm with dialog before deleting/removing

content_guidelines.tone: Professional but friendly - like a helpful colleague
content_guidelines.error_messages: Explain what went wrong and how to fix it
content_guidelines.empty_states: Encouraging and helpful, not just 'No data'

navigation_principles.wayfinding: Users should always know where they are
navigation_principles.breadcrumbs: Use for deep hierarchies (location analytics, team org)
navigation_principles.back_navigation: Provide clear ways to go back
navigation_principles.shortcuts: Keyboard shortcuts for power users (document them)

data_display.tables: Sortable columns, filterable data, clear pagination
data_display.charts: Clear labels, legends, tooltips on hover
data_display.timestamps: Relative time (2 hours ago) with absolute on hover

form_design.required_fields: Mark clearly with asterisk and label
form_design.input_types: Use appropriate types (email, tel, date, etc.)
form_design.autocomplete: Enable browser autocomplete for common fields
form_design.validation_timing: On blur for individual fields, on submit for form
form_design.error_recovery: Keep user's input, highlight errors, focus first error

responsive_behavior.hover_states: Don't rely on hover for critical info on touch devices
responsive_behavior.orientation: Support both portrait and landscape on tablets
responsive_behavior.text_sizing: Use relative units (rem, em) not fixed px
responsive_behavior.images: Responsive with srcset, appropriate sizes for viewports

performance_ux.actual_performance: Lazy loading, code splitting, image optimization
performance_ux.slow_connections: Progressive enhancement, don't block on slow assets

anti_ai_slop_rules: DO NOT create generic centered layouts - use intentional alignment
DO NOT use simplistic gradients - prefer solid colors with texture
DO NOT apply uniform styling - create visual hierarchy through variation
DO NOT use dark colors as gradients - use them independently
DO NOT use AI assistant emojis (🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇) for icons
depth_and_layering: Create depth through z-index hierarchy and layered elements
Use subtle shadows for elevation (shadow-sm, shadow-md)
Layer backgrounds with slight color variations
Use borders to separate layers (1px subtle borders)
transitions_critical: NEVER use transition: all - it breaks transforms
ALWAYS specify exact properties: transition-colors, transition-transform, transition-opacity
Use duration-200 or duration-300 for most interactions
Use ease-out for natural feeling animations
text_alignment_critical: DO NOT center-align the app container
DO NOT add text-align: center to .App in CSS
Left-align by default for natural reading flow
Center-align only specific elements when intentional
button_styling: Use pill-shaped buttons (rounded-full) for primary actions
Ensure color contrast on all states (default, hover, active, focus)
micro_interactions: Every interaction needs feedback - hover, click, focus
Add smooth color transitions on interactive elements
Include loading states for async actions
spacing_emphasis: Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable
Generous padding on cards: p-8 md:p-10 lg:p-12
Large gaps between sections: gap-8 md:gap-12 lg:gap-16
Breathing room prevents cramped, cheap appearance
component_reuse: Prioritize using pre-existing Shadcn components from /app/frontend/src/components/ui/
Create new components that match existing style and conventions
Examine existing components before creating new ones
Maintain consistent patterns across the application
export_conventions: Components MUST use named exports: export const ComponentName = ...
Pages MUST use default exports: export default function PageName() {...}
toast_notifications: Use Sonner for all toast notifications
image_usage: Use images from image_assets section only
NEVER use placeholder text for images
Optimize images with appropriate sizes and formats
